title: Rumours
shortDescription: Heartbreak set to perfect pop-rock harmonies.
review: The benchmark for breakup-record honesty disguised as effortless pop. Every track earns its place. Stevie's voice on Dreams alone justifies the whole catalog.

title: Wish You Were Here
shortDescription: An album-length elegy to absence and the music industry.
review: Shine On You Crazy Diamond is one of the most patient, generous pieces of rock ever recorded. Listen on headphones at night.

title: Kind of Blue
shortDescription: The most consequential jazz record ever made.
review: Modal jazz invented in real time. The conversation between Miles, Coltrane, and Cannonball is so loose it sounds inevitable.

title: In Rainbows
shortDescription: Radiohead at their warmest and most human.
review: After the cold of Kid A and Hail to the Thief, In Rainbows brought texture and heart back. Reckoner is a masterclass in restraint.

title: Voodoo
shortDescription: Slow-cooked neo-soul that rewards every replay.
review: The pocket on this record is unreal. Questlove's drag-feel drumming behind D'Angelo's falsetto sets a standard nothing has matched since.

title: Random Access Memories
shortDescription: A love letter to disco from two robots.

title: A Love Supreme
shortDescription: Spiritual jazz at its absolute peak.
review: A four-part suite that feels less like an album and more like a prayer. Acknowledgement loops in your head for days.

title: Abbey Road
shortDescription: The Beatles' last and best-arranged record.

title: InnerSpeaker
shortDescription: Bedroom psychedelia that scales to stadium size.

title: To Pimp a Butterfly
shortDescription: A jazz-funk-rap statement of the decade.
review: Dense, political, formally ambitious. King Kunta and Alright are anthems but the deep cuts are where the writing really breathes.

title: Inception (Original Soundtrack)
shortDescription: The defining film score of the 2010s.
review: Time is the kind of cue that ruins other movie music for you. Pure tension and release in eight minutes.

title: i,i
shortDescription: The mature closing chapter of Bon Iver's seasonal cycle.

title: The Suburbs
shortDescription: A concept album about growing up nowhere in particular.

title: Discovery
review: One More Time and Digital Love are the obvious ones, but Veridis Quo is the heart. Still sounds futuristic.

title: Mordechai
shortDescription: Globe-trotting psychedelic soul on cruise control.

title: All Melody
shortDescription: Hand-built ambient electronics with a piano at the center.
